taxon.distribution: Europe, North Africa, Turkey, Caucasus, Russia (Europe) to Central Asia, Iran. Introduced to Canada

referenceObject.reference: Hippa, H. & Oksala, I. (1982). Definition and revision of the Enoplognatha ovata (Clerck) group (Araneae: Theridiidae). Entomologica Scandinavica 13(2): 213-222. doi: 10.1163/187631282X00147
